judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent computed the top state by summing the business collection’s review_count from only five returned business records and then averaged ratings for just those businesses (yielding MO), rather than counting all reviews by state from the review table across all businesses (which would yield PA), as seen in the trace where it relied on the business query result and never aggregated reviews by state from the review table.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

The agent queried only a limited subset of 100 business records (function-call-6690647015170396632) and then summed review_count over this subset to select the state (function-call-12897535034285518713), leading to "MO" and an average rating computed from an incomplete set of businesses instead of using the full dataset that yields "PA".
